mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_NO AS userNo, u.USER_TYPE AS userType, u.USER_CREATED_AT AS userCreatedAt, u.USER_UPDATED_AT AS userUpdatedAt, u.USER_STATUS AS userStatus, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.USER_GENDER AS userGender, u.USER_PHONENUMBER AS userPhoneNumber, u.USER_REGISTRATION_NO AS userRegistrationNo, u.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickName, u.USER_PROFILE_IMG AS userProfileImg FROM USERS u JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}

SELECT utm.MAPPING_NO, utm.USER_NO, utm.QUESTION_ID, utm.TAG_CODE, tm.TAG_NAME, tm.TAG_CATEGORY FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = utm.USER_NO LEFT JOIN TAG_MASTER tm ON tm.TAG_CODE = utm.TAG_CODE WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value} ORDER BY tm.TAG_CATEGORY ASC, tm.TAG_NAME ASC, utm.MAPPING_NO ASC
SELECT TAG_CODE, TAG_NAME, TAG_CATEGORY FROM TAG_MASTER ORDER BY TAG_CATEGORY ASC, TAG_NAME ASC

SELECT utm.MAPPING_NO, utm.USER_NO, utm.QUESTION_ID, utm.TAG_CODE, tm.TAG_NAME, tm.TAG_CATEGORY FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm LEFT JOIN TAG_MASTER tm ON tm.TAG_CODE = utm.TAG_CODE WHERE utm.USER_NO = #{value} ORDER BY tm.TAG_CATEGORY ASC, tm.TAG_NAME ASC, utm.MAPPING_NO ASC
